input_summary.name: example-review-swarm
input_summary.prompt_risk: May override local review policy if imported wholesale.

pass_criteria: Scripts are treated as untrusted until reviewed.
Runtime claims are downgraded unless validated locally.
fail_criteria: README claims are treated as proof of Codex compatibility.
Network or shell scripts are imported without review.
negative_controls: Listing with no source URL, license, or attribution trail.
Executable script imported without permission and dependency review.
Prompt text that shadows or overrides OpenNort workflow rules.
